candidates.why: Explicit total top-line revenue label; preferred over Net Sales as a direct total revenue line.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list per instructions; later code should take first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Valid COGS label, but appears twice in the statement and cannot be uniquely distinguished by label alone.

candidates.row_label: Non-Recurring Cost of Goods Sold - Other
candidates.why: Non-recurring item, not core COGS.
Unique, explicit total cost-of-sales line matching the full COGS concept.

candidates.why: Valid SG&A overhead component.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; best match.

candidates.why: Equity label exists but appears unpopulated in preview and is less precise than the parent-only equity line.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders in Parent Company

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the preferred owner/parent-only equity line. Selected 'Equity attributable to shareholders in Parent Company' to exclude non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to shareholders in Parent Company

Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance sheet minority interest stock.
